# crusoe_vpc_network (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "crusoe_vpc_network" "example" {
  name = "my-vpc-network"
  cidr = "10.0.0.0/8"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cidr` (String)
- `name` (String)

### Optional

- `project_id` (String)

### Read-Only

- `gateway` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `subnets` (List of String)

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
# Resources are imported by their ID. To target a specific project, append the
# project ID using the format "<id>,<project_id>".
terraform import crusoe_vpc_network.example <vpc_network_id>
```
